case_title: PATEL, DILIP M. vs. FARRELL, FRED et al

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PATEL, DILIP M. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FARRELL, FRED THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 310 COLUMBUS AVE #230, LEASE FORFEITED
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $105.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, DILIP M. AS TO DEFENDANT FARRELL, FRED
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT FARRELL, FRED
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $12.86 FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, DILIP M.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, DILIP M. SERVED JUN-01-1994, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT FARRELL, FRED
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PATEL, DILIP M. AS TO DEFENDANT FARRELL, FRED DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT FARRELL, FRED
